settings.heading: FILL. LIFT. SCULPT
settings.additional_information: Your all-in-one brow grooming tool!      Meet Witching Hour, the ultimate quick-fix for microbladed brows.

settings.heading: LIFT. HOLD. SCLUPT.
settings.additional_information: Your new everyday brow ritual is here! Meet Arc Angel, a clear BROW GEL, for instantly laminated brows.

settings.title: Made with love. Crafted with wisdom.
settings.desc: Born to help you explore the universe inside you; Introducing Mokae Beauty. Dive deep into our range of high-performance, clean, and safe makeup, consisting of holistic formulations perfected over time. We hope trying these products helps you discover a personal sense of play.

settings.custom_liquid:
PLAY WITH YOUR INNER UNIVERSE

We believe beauty and wellbeing often begin inwards, with the nourishment of the soul and a deeper connection with yourself; the kind that inevitably radiates outwards. We invite you to join us at Mokae Lab, where you can explore a curated range of ideas, rituals, and offline experiences, the benefits of which we can personally vouch for. Everyone is welcome, as long as you carry your curiosity along with you.

Discover
